deploy.description: Full deploy pipeline: test, lint, build, push
deploy.prompt: Run the deploy agent — typecheck, lint, test, build, git push

audit.prompt: Run security subagent on changed files and report findings

cleanup.description: Find dead code, unused deps, stale files

health.description: Project health check — builds, tests, vulns
health.prompt: Run typecheck, lint, test, check npm audit, git status
